content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_ProfitLossLedger
-- drop view v_ProfitLossLedger
as

SELECT DISTINCT AIT1, OC.CUNO, NULL as [Item Number], MONTH(ACDT) as Month, YEAR(ACDT) as Year, ABS(SUM(ACAM)) as Amount
from M3.FGLEDG FG
JOIN M3.OCUSMA OC on FG.AIT6 = OC.CUNO
WHERE FG.AIT1 IN
(
'431050',
'421020',
'620000',
'421040',
'721010',
'421070',
'421050',
'421055',
'421060',
'421030'
)
GROUP BY AIT1, OC.CUNO, MONTH(ACDT), YEAR(ACDT)

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT AIT1, oc2.cuno, NULL as [Item Number], MONTH(ACDT) as Month, YEAR(ACDT) as Year, ABS(SUM(ACAM)) as Amount
from M3.FGLEDG FG
LEFT JOIN M3.OCUSMA OC on FG.AIT6 = OC.CUNO
JOIN M3.OCUSMA OC2 on SUBSTRING(VTXT,0, CHARINDEX(' ',VTXT)) = OC2.CUNO
WHERE FG.AIT1 IN
(
'431050',
'421020',
'620000',
'421040',
'721010',
'421070',
'421050',
'421055',
'421060',
'421030'
)
AND OC.CUNO is null
GROUP BY AIT1, oc2.cuno, MONTH(ACDT), YEAR(ACDT)

UNION ALL 

SELECT      '411010' as [AIT1]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [CUNO]
,           SD.[Part ID - Actual] as [Item Number]
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year 
,           ABS(SUM([Sales Amt])) as Amount
FROM        a_SalesData SD
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster IM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] collate database_default = IM.[Item Number] collate database_default
WHERE       [Sales Type] = 'Sales'
AND         [Part ID - Actual] NOT LIKE 'Q1%'
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           SD.[Part ID - Actual]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])

UNION ALL 

SELECT      '541010' as [AIT1]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [CUNO]
,           SD.[Part ID - Actual] as [Item Number]
,           cast(MONTH([Date]) as int) as Month
,           cast(YEAR([Date]) as int) as Year 
,           SUM([Cost]) as Amount
FROM        a_SalesData SD
WHERE       [Sales Type] = 'Sales'
AND         [Part ID - Actual] NOT LIKE 'Q1%'
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           SD.[Part ID - Actual]
,           YEAR([Date])
,           MONTH([Date])
/*
UNION ALL

Create view v_FreightOutProfitLoss
as
SELECT      AIT1
,           CUNO
,           [Item Number]
,           Month
,           Year
,           SUM([Total Weight]/NULLIF(InvWeightTotal, 0)*Amount) as Amount
FROM
(
SELECT      '711020' as [AIT1]
,           [Invoice ID]
,           cast([Customer ID] as varchar(max)) collate database_default as [CUNO]
,           SD.[Part ID - Actual] as [Item Number]
,           COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty] as [Total Weight]
,           [Sales Qty]
,           SUM(COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty]) OVER (PARTITION BY [Customer ID], [Invoice ID]) as InvWeightTotal
,           MONTH(ACDT) as Month
,           YEAR(ACDT) as Year
,           SUM([ACAM]) as Amount
FROM        M3.FGLEDG FG
JOIN        a_SalesData SD on LEFT(SUBSTRING(FG.VTXT,CHARINDEX(' 24',FG.VTXT)+1,LEN(FG.VTXT)),10) = SD.[Invoice ID]
LEFT JOIN BI_ItemMaster MM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = MM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN M3.MITMAS IM on SD.[Part ID - Actual] = IM.ITNO
WHERE      FG.AIT1 = '711020'
AND         AIT7 = 'OI201411'
AND         YEAR(ACDT) = 2024
GROUP BY    [Customer ID]
,           [Invoice ID]
,           SD.[Part ID - Actual]
,           [Sales Qty]
,          YEAR([ACDT])
,           MONTH([ACDT])
,           COALESCE(NULLIF(MM.Weight,0), NULLIF(NULLIF(IM.GRWE,''),0))*[Sales Qty]
) A
GROUP BY AIT1
,           CUNO
,           [Item Number]
,           Month
,           Year
*/
